title: Emissive Piglin Eyes
description:
Simple resourcepack that makes Piglin/Hoglin eyes emmisive!
Works with FA!
body:
This is a resourcepack that makes the piglin/hoglin and every other variation of the nether pigs have emissive eyes.
This works with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/50dA9Sha)
(although you probably wont needed with FA emissive)
Requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)!

The emissive eyes are applied to piglin, zombie piglin, piglin brute, hoglin and zoglin.
probably works with other texture packs that only change the entity texture

Gallery screenshots were made using the most wonderful resourcepack called [Visual Effects+](https://modrinth.com/project/ZyZknBVG) check it out!
